name: Baby Squash with Capers and Parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the squash and water to the skillet. Cover.
3. Cook the squash until it is almost crisp-tender, about 4 minutes.
4. Uncover the skillet and stir until the liquid evaporates and the squash is crisp-tender, about 2 more minutes.
5. Transfer the cooked squash to a bowl.
6. Add the capers, chopped parsley, and lemon juice to the squash. Toss gently to coat evenly.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve warm or at room temperature.
